Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint Amending Plaintiffs Name
Off Calendar Mar-04-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. KELLY HILL, Esq. of Gurstel Law Firm, P.C. (Tel: 858-279-7920) for plaintiff Excess Solutions;
Atty. ERIC G. FERNANDEZ, Esq. of Goodman Law Corporation (Tel: 916-643-0600) for defendant/cross-complainant CII Tech, Inc.

Hearing Re: Plaintiff EXCESS SOLUTIONS' Motion For Leave To File First Amended Complaint Amending Plaintiff's Name.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's motion for leave to file first amended complaint is granted. Defendants show that Plaintiff "EXCESS SOLUTIONS, a corporation" (Compl., pars. 1, CC-1) is a suspended corporation. (RJN, Ex. B [articles of incorporation]; Fernandez Decl., par. 5 & Ex. 3.) As such, it "may not prosecute or defend an action in a California court." (Timberline, Inc. v. Jaisinghani (1997) 54 Cal.App.4th 1361, 1366; see also Casiopea Bovet, LLC v. Chiang (2017) 12 Cal.App.5th 656 [same].) However, Plaintiff presents evidence that counsel mistakenly named the suspended corporation as the plaintiff, and that the underlying transactions were entered into by a sole proprietorship of Michael A. Giordano under the same name. (Giordano Decl. pars. 2-5 & Exs. A, B.) Defendant may conduct discovery regarding those contentions.

Defendants' request for sanctions in the amount of $9,100 is denied without prejudice to its renewal, should it later be shown that the complaint in fact arises out of transactions with the suspended corporation and that Plaintiff's counsel knew of its status and nevertheless improperly filed and prosecuted the instant action on its behalf. (See City of San Diego v. San Diegans for Open Government (2016) 3 Cal.App.5th 568, 578 [counsel's explicit approval of suspended corporation's appearance and representation of suspended corporation in litigation was "clearly unethical"].)

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/EPS)
